seo.title: Business Analyst Resume Examples & ATS Templates 2026
seo.description: Write a perfect Business Analyst resume in 2026. Includes CBAP keywords, process mapping skills, and a complete BA resume example that passes ATS.
seo.keywords: business analyst resume, BA resume template, CBAP resume, business analysis resume, agile business analyst resume 2026
seo.ogDescription: The exact BA resume template that lands consulting and tech industry interviews.

hero.title: Business Analyst Resume Examples
hero.description: Your BA skills translate complex business problems into solutions. Your resume should do the same — translate your experience into clear, quantified impact that ATS and hiring managers love.

mistakes: Listing responsibilities without business outcomes (e.g., 'Gathered requirements' vs 'Gathered and documented requirements for a $3M ERP implementation, delivered on time and under budget').
Forgetting to mention domain expertise — industry knowledge (FinTech, Healthcare, Insurance) is a major differentiator.
Not listing tools — JIRA, Confluence, Visio, SQL are expected. Omitting them hurts ATS scores.
tips: Quantify project scope: 'led requirements for a $5M digital transformation' signals seniority.
Mention specific methodologies: Agile/Scrum, Waterfall, SAFe, or a hybrid approach.
Include your CBAP, ECBA, or CSPO certification prominently — these are ATS keywords for BA roles.

exampleResume.name: Sarah Thompson
exampleResume.title: Senior Business Analyst
exampleResume.summary: CBAP-certified Senior Business Analyst with 7+ years of experience across FinTech and insurance industries. Led requirements gathering for $15M+ digital transformation initiatives. Expert in Agile methodologies, process optimization, and stakeholder management.

bullets: Led requirements elicitation for a core banking system replacement ($12M budget), documenting 200+ functional requirements across 6 stakeholder groups.
Facilitated 40+ JAD sessions and stakeholder workshops, identifying $2.1M in process inefficiencies through As-Is/To-Be analysis.
Reduced UAT defect rate by 35% by implementing structured test case reviews aligned with business requirements.
Documented end-to-end claims processing BRD for an insurance portal serving 500k policyholders.
Implemented Agile ceremonies and backlog management in JIRA, improving sprint velocity by 28%.

exampleResume.skills: Requirements Gathering, BRD/FRD Writing, Agile/Scrum, JIRA, Confluence, BPMN (Visio/Lucidchart), SQL, Stakeholder Management, UAT, Gap Analysis | Certifications: CBAP, CSPO
